xanesnet.models.envembed package¶

Public API for the EnvEmbed model.

class xanesnet.models.envembed.EnvEmbed(model_type, in_size, kgroups, n_shells, max_radius_angs, init_width, use_gating, head_hidden, head_depth, dropout)[source]¶

Bases: Model

Environment Embedding model.

Architecture:

  1. SoftRadialShellsEncoder: learnable soft radial shell binning over absorber-centric distances, fused with the absorber descriptor to produce a fixed-size latent vector.

  2. CoeffHeadGroupedResidualPreLN: shared Pre-LN residual trunk predicting spectral basis coefficients per width group.

Parameters:

  • model_type (str) – Model type string (passed to base class).

  • in_size (int) – Descriptor feature dimension H.

  • kgroups (list[int]) – Number of spectral basis coefficients per width group.

  • n_shells (int) – Number of learnable radial shells.

  • max_radius_angs (float) – Radial cutoff in A.

  • init_width (float) – Initial Gaussian shell width in A.

  • use_gating (bool) – If True, modulate shell summary with Fourier distance features.

  • head_hidden (int) – Hidden dimension of the residual blocks in the coefficient head.

  • head_depth (int) – Number of ResidualPreLNBlock layers in the coefficient head trunk.

  • dropout (float) – Dropout probability applied in the coefficient head residual blocks.

__init__(model_type, in_size, kgroups, n_shells, max_radius_angs, init_width, use_gating, head_hidden, head_depth, dropout)[source]¶

Initialize EnvEmbed.

forward(descriptor_features, distance_features, lengths, basis)[source]¶

Encode the local chemical environment and predict the XANES spectrum.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_features (Tensor) – Padded descriptor features with absorber at index 0, shape (B, N, H).

  • distance_features (Tensor) – Distances from the absorber atom, shape (B, N).

  • lengths (Tensor) – Number of real atoms per sample (before padding), shape (B,).

  • basis (SpectralBasis) – Spectral basis used to reconstruct the spectrum from coefficients.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predicted XANES spectra of shape (B, n_energies).

init_weights(weights_init, bias_init, **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize model weights and biases.

Applies the given initialization to nn.Linear layers in the encoder. For the coefficient head, ResidualPreLNBlock inner layers are initialized while group head layers retain their zero initialization.

Parameters:

  • weights_init (str) – Name of the weight initializer registered in WeightInitRegistry.

  • bias_init (str) – Name of the bias initializer registered in BiasInitRegistry.

  • **kwargs – Additional keyword arguments forwarded to the weight initializer.

Return type:

None

property signature: Config¶

Return the model signature as a Config.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.models.envembed.envembed module¶

Environment Embedding (EnvEmbed) prediction model.

class xanesnet.models.envembed.envembed.EnvEmbed(model_type, in_size, kgroups, n_shells, max_radius_angs, init_width, use_gating, head_hidden, head_depth, dropout)[source]¶

Bases: Model

Environment Embedding model.

Architecture:

  1. SoftRadialShellsEncoder: learnable soft radial shell binning over absorber-centric distances, fused with the absorber descriptor to produce a fixed-size latent vector.

  2. CoeffHeadGroupedResidualPreLN: shared Pre-LN residual trunk predicting spectral basis coefficients per width group.

Parameters:

  • model_type (str) – Model type string (passed to base class).

  • in_size (int) – Descriptor feature dimension H.

  • kgroups (list[int]) – Number of spectral basis coefficients per width group.

  • n_shells (int) – Number of learnable radial shells.

  • max_radius_angs (float) – Radial cutoff in A.

  • init_width (float) – Initial Gaussian shell width in A.

  • use_gating (bool) – If True, modulate shell summary with Fourier distance features.

  • head_hidden (int) – Hidden dimension of the residual blocks in the coefficient head.

  • head_depth (int) – Number of ResidualPreLNBlock layers in the coefficient head trunk.

  • dropout (float) – Dropout probability applied in the coefficient head residual blocks.

__init__(model_type, in_size, kgroups, n_shells, max_radius_angs, init_width, use_gating, head_hidden, head_depth, dropout)[source]¶

Initialize EnvEmbed.

forward(descriptor_features, distance_features, lengths, basis)[source]¶

Encode the local chemical environment and predict the XANES spectrum.

Parameters:

  • descriptor_features (Tensor) – Padded descriptor features with absorber at index 0, shape (B, N, H).

  • distance_features (Tensor) – Distances from the absorber atom, shape (B, N).

  • lengths (Tensor) – Number of real atoms per sample (before padding), shape (B,).

  • basis (SpectralBasis) – Spectral basis used to reconstruct the spectrum from coefficients.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Predicted XANES spectra of shape (B, n_energies).

init_weights(weights_init, bias_init, **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize model weights and biases.

Applies the given initialization to nn.Linear layers in the encoder. For the coefficient head, ResidualPreLNBlock inner layers are initialized while group head layers retain their zero initialization.

Parameters:

  • weights_init (str) – Name of the weight initializer registered in WeightInitRegistry.

  • bias_init (str) – Name of the bias initializer registered in BiasInitRegistry.

  • **kwargs – Additional keyword arguments forwarded to the weight initializer.

Return type:

None

property signature: Config¶

Return the model signature as a Config.
